title: The Record Shop at the End of the World
emotional_profile: nostalgic warmth: analog soul, human connection through music, late 90s / early 2000s melancholy and comfort, rain, vinyl, handwritten tags
cinematic_description: The last independent record store in a fading American town. Marcus Rivera keeps the lights on and the music playing for the few people who still need it. A world of warmth, dust, and the songs that saved people.
quality_notes: Strong nostalgic warmth introduction. Beautiful analog textures and human hands on vinyl. Excellent contrast to the cooler emotional drama world.
